title: Malty Dense German Bacon Bake
description: A rich, comforting German-inspired dish featuring crispy bacon lardon, malty flavors, and a dense texture.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, oats, and salt.
In a large skillet, cook the bacon lardons over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until crispy.
Transfer the bacon to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess fat.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, malt syrup (or dark corn syrup), brown sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
Stir in the cooked bacon, thyme sprigs, and melted butter.
Pour the batter into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
